query: SELECT tc.id, tc.item, tc.domain, tc.milestone, tl.procedure_col FROM topic_criteria tc JOIN topic_lists tl ON tc.topic_list_id = tl.id LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kpmXQEhQh9QUB5.9201f3ecb012 --database dyAwmFLrC4fePdcS2zLLQv --execute SELECT tc.id, tc.item, tc.domain, tc.milestone, tl.procedure_col FROM topic_criteria tc JOIN topic_lists tl ON tc.topic_list_id = tl.id LIMIT 30;
